scripts.dev: concurrently --names "types,server,client" --prefix-colors "cyan,blue,green" "pnpm --filter @projectx/types dev" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.verify:fast: pnpm run lint:check && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test
scripts.verify: pnpm run lint:check && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test
scripts.verify:strict: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint:check && pnpm run typecheck:full && pnpm run test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:server && pnpm run typecheck:client
scripts.typecheck:full: pnpm run typecheck:server && pnpm run typecheck:client
scripts.lint:check: pnpm --filter server lint:check && pnpm --filter client lint:check
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm --filter server lint:fix && pnpm --filter client lint:fix
scripts.format: pnpm --filter server format && pnpm --filter client format
scripts.format:check: pnpm --filter server format:check && pnpm --filter client format:check
scripts.test: pnpm run test:server && pnpm run test:client
scripts.coverage: pnpm run coverage:server && pnpm run coverage:client
